meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Scaling Projects with Antigravity & Claude
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'basic app' plateau. Learn how to scale your freelance projects using Antigravity and Claude Code for professional-grade, rapid development.
content.answer_block: To break past basic app limitations, you must shift from manual coding to architecture-driven development. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative logic refinement, you can automate complex workflows, ensure modularity, and ship enterprise-ready features in a fraction of the time required by traditional stacks.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the project starts with high hopes, but by the third feature request, the codebase becomes a brittle house of cards. You're stuck building 'basic apps' because your workflow lacks the structural integrity to handle complexity, forcing you to trade quality for speed just to meet a deadline.

It’s time to stop fighting your tools and start orchestrating them. By integrating Antigravity for structural precision and Claude Code for intelligent implementation, you regain control over your development lifecycle. This isn't just about faster typing; it's about building a scalable engine that turns freelance constraints into a competitive advantage.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define the project structure and core entities to prevent spaghetti code before writing a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modular project architecture for a high-performance SaaS. Define the directory structure, base interfaces, and dependency injection patterns for a scalable Node.js/TypeScript environment.

steps.title: Data Modeling & Schema Validation
steps.description: Ensure data integrity by defining schemas early, preventing the common 'basic app' failure of unvalidated inputs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Zod schemas and Prisma models for a multi-tenant user management system. Include roles, permissions, and audit logs.

steps.title: Logic Layer Implementation
steps.description: Inject business logic using Claude Code to ensure that your features adhere to the architectural patterns established in Step 1.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a service layer for authentication that handles JWT rotation and rate limiting per user tier.

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Stop manual testing. Generate unit and integration tests that validate your business logic against edge cases.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive Vitest suite covering all edge cases for the authentication service and user role transitions.

steps.title: Deployment & CI/CD Pipeline
steps.description: Automate the transition from local development to production, ensuring zero-downtime deployments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing, linting, and deployment to AWS via Terraform.

pro_tips: Always define a 'Context Document' (context.md) in your root to keep Claude Code aligned with your specific design system.
Use Antigravity to generate 'dry-run' architecture diagrams before writing logic to catch structural flaws early.
Implement a 'Middleware-First' approach to handle cross-cutting concerns like logging and security, keeping your core business logic clean.
Leverage Claude Code's ability to read your entire codebase; always 'index' your project after major structural changes.
Treat your prompts as code—version control your Antigravity prompt library to ensure consistent output across different client projects.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, begin integrating your project into a CI/CD pipeline and implement feature flagging to allow for safe, incremental client deployments.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for basic apps and start engineering professional-grade software that scales with your business. By mastering these tools, you transform from a freelancer into a high-leverage AI architect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
